title: What a Qualified Person Does
alt: Checklist of the core duties a pharmaceutical Qualified Person performs

items.label: Batch certification
items.desc: Reviews records, results and CoA against the marketing authorisation.

items.label: Deviation review
items.desc: Assesses if deviations or OOS results affect the batch.

items.label: Change control
items.desc: Confirms process, supplier and spec changes are approved.

items.label: Supplier assurance
items.desc: Ensures actives and excipients come from approved, audited sources.

items.label: Complaints & recalls
items.desc: Tracks quality trends and any signal warranting a recall.

items.label: Data integrity
items.desc: Relies on complete, trustworthy ALCOA+ records to certify.
